name: Module Refactor
description: Refactor a module for clarity, maintainability, or performance without changing external behavior.
checklist: Read all callers of the module before refactoring
Identify all exported names — do not rename without updating all callers
Run existing tests before starting to establish baseline
Preserve all existing public interfaces exactly
Extract helper functions — do not add business logic
Remove dead code only if confirmed unused (grep first)
No behavior change — same inputs must produce same outputs
Run node --check or lint after every file change
Run tests after refactor to verify no regression
If splitting a file, update all import paths
example_tasks: Extract generateSuggestions into a separate helper function
Split forge.js route handlers into smaller files
common_failure_modes: Renamed export breaks callers in other files
Test fails because internal structure changed unexpectedly
Import path wrong after file moved
output_format: Refactored file(s) with identical external behavior
